TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear1__oemaw a _obay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hayza' 'aehae' ka tatini'.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ ka tatiniʔ.
S.FORM: hayza' 'aehae' ka tatini'.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ ka tatiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人.
There was an old man.

S.FORM: rima' ila ray pamowa'an ka boboway.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila raj pamowaʔan ka βoβowaj.
S.FORM: rima' ila ray pamowa'an ka boboway.
S.PHON: rimaʔ ila raj pamowaʔan ka βoβowaj.
S.TRANSL: 去了果園.

TRANSL.notes: (He) went to an orchard.

S.TRANSL: went to an orchard.

S.FORM: 'isaa o minboway ila ka niya pamowa'an.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o minβowaj ila ka nija pamowaʔan.
S.FORM: 'isaa o minboway ila ka niya pamowa'an.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o minβowaj ila ka nija pamowaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 他的果園長了水果.
The trees that he planted have borne fruits.

S.FORM: 'isaa ka tatini' ma' rima' ila ma kiboway.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ka tatiniʔ maʔ rimaʔ ila ma kiβowaj.
S.FORM: 'isaa ka tatini' ma' rima' ila ma kiboway.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ka tatiniʔ maʔ rimaʔ ila ma kiβowaj.

S.FORM: rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人去摘水果了.
The old man went to pick the fruits."

S.FORM: 'isaa o rokrok ka boway 'oka' 'araS ka kala'.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o rokrok ka βowaj ʔokaʔ ʔaraʃ ka kalaʔ.
S.FORM: 'isaa o rokrok ka boway 'oka' 'araS ka kala'.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o rokrok ka βowaj ʔokaʔ ʔaraʃ ka kalaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果,可是都沒有帶著籃子.
He picked fruits, but he did not bring any basket."

S.FORM: niya noka 'obos noka kaybaeen tino kala' 'ano o isaza.
S.PHON: nija noka ʔoβos~θ noka kajβæən tino kalaʔ ʔano o is~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: niya noka 'obos noka kaybaeen tino kala' 'ano o isaza.
S.PHON: nija noka ʔoβos~θ noka kajβæən tino kalaʔ ʔano o is~θaz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 就用衣服的口袋來當作他的籃子.

TRANSL.notes: (so he used) his clothes-pocket for a basket.

S.TRANSL: his clothes-pocket for a basket.

S.FORM: 'araSen o ta'as ila ray (r)ay rai' 'isaa ka kala' 'aSkan hayza (r)ay rai'.
S.PHON: ʔaraʃən o taʔas~θ ila raj (r)aj raiʔ ʔis~θaa ka kalaʔ ʔaʃkan hajz~ða (r)aj raiʔ.
S.FORM: 'araSen o ta'as ila ray (r)ay rai' 'isaa ka kala' 'aSkan hayza (r)ay rai'.
S.PHON: ʔaraʃən o taʔas~θ ila raj (r)aj raiʔ ʔis~θaa ka kalaʔ ʔaʃkan hajz~ða (r)aj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 帶著就放在 ... ... 地上,地上有一個剛放下的籃子.
There was a basket put on the ground.

S.FORM: 'isa o niya ka karokrokan ka 'isa ka boboway kaehoey kin 'ibabaw.
S.PHON: ʔis~θa o nija ka karokrokan ka ʔis~θa ka βoβowaj kæhœj kin ʔiβaβaw.
S.FORM: 'isa o niya ka karokrokan ka 'isa ka boboway kaehoey kin 'ibabaw.
S.PHON: ʔis~θa o nija ka karokrokan ka ʔis~θa ka βoβowaj kæhœj kin ʔiβaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 他要摘水果的地方非常的高.
He was picking fruits on top of the tree.

S.FORM: 'isahiza ka tatini' rima' ta'itol ila hao babaw o rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔis~θahiz~ða ka tatiniʔ rimaʔ taʔitol ila hao βaβaw o rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: 'isahiza ka tatini' rima' ta'itol ila hao babaw o rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔis~θahiz~ða ka tatiniʔ rimaʔ taʔitol ila hao βaβaw o rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人爬到樹上那邊,在摘水果.
The old man went up the tree to pick fruits there.

S.FORM: o isaza 'aehae' mae'iyaeh nila 'ima hoehoeh ka 'aehae' ka Siri'.
S.PHON: o is~θaz~ða ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh nila ʔima hœhœh ka ʔæhæʔ ka ʃiriʔ.
S.FORM: o isaza 'aehae' mae'iyaeh nila 'ima hoehoeh ka 'aehae' ka Siri'.
S.PHON: o is~θaz~ða ʔæhæʔ mæʔijæh nila ʔima hœhœh ka ʔæhæʔ ka ʃiriʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那裡有一個人拉著一頭羊.
A person came pulling a goat.

S.FORM: y~a niya 'inaz'azem koSa o hini ka hoehoeh ka Siri' 'am mwai' ma tatilhaehael ka hini ka tatini' mo rokrok ka ka boway.
S.PHON: j~a nija ʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəm koʃa o hini ka hœhœh ka ʃiriʔ ʔam mwaiʔ ma tatilhæhæl ka hini ka tatiniʔ mo rokrok ka ka βowaj.
S.FORM: y~a niya 'inaz'azem koSa o hini ka hoehoeh ka Siri' 'am mwai' ma tatilhaehael ka hini ka tatini' mo rokrok ka ka boway.
S.PHON: j~a nija ʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəm koʃa o hini ka hœhœh ka ʃiriʔ ʔam mwaiʔ ma tatilhæhæl ka hini ka tatiniʔ mo rokrok ka ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 他心想,這個拉著羊的人要來幫忙這個老人摘水果.

TRANSL.notes: (He) thought this (man) pulling a goat has come to help the old man pick fruits.

S.TRANSL: thought this pulling a goat has come to help the old man pick fruits.

S.FORM: 'isaa o 'isaa ka hoehoeh ka Siri' lososooi ilahao kabih.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o ʔis~θaa ka hœhœh ka ʃiriʔ los~θos~θooi ilahao kaβih.
S.FORM: 'isaa o 'isaa ka hoehoeh ka Siri' lososooi ilahao kabih.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o ʔis~θaa ka hœhœh ka ʃiriʔ los~θos~θooi ilahao kaβih.
S.TRANSL: 那個拉著羊的人一直走走到另外一邊去了.

TRANSL.notes: (But) that (man) pulling a goat proceeded on his way.

S.TRANSL: that pulling a goat proceeded on his way.

S.FORM: hini o ina rorol 'aehae' ka ka korkoring 'am 'ima papama' ka kapapama'an ka kapapama'an noka korkoring.
S.PHON: hini o ina rorol ʔæhæʔ ka ka korkoriŋ ʔam ʔima papamaʔ ka kapapamaʔan ka kapapamaʔan noka korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: hini o ina rorol 'aehae' ka ka korkoring 'am 'ima papama' ka kapapama'an ka kapapama'an noka korkoring.
S.PHON: hini o ina rorol ʔæhæʔ ka ka korkoriŋ ʔam ʔima papamaʔ ka kapapamaʔan ka kapapamaʔan noka korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 這個有一個跟在後面 ... ... 有個小孩騎著他的腳踏車.
A child riding on his bike followed.

S.FORM: 'isaa o ka tatini' 'okay sahoeroe' ka 'isaza ka korkoring.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o ka tatiniʔ ʔokaj s~θahœrœʔ ka ʔis~θaz~ða ka korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: 'isaa o ka tatini' 'okay sahoeroe' ka 'isaza ka korkoring.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa o ka tatiniʔ ʔokaj s~θahœrœʔ ka ʔis~θaz~ða ka korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人沒有看到那一個小孩.
The old man didn't see the child.

S.FORM: tatini' hao ray kaehoey babaw 'okay sasahoeroi.
S.PHON: tatiniʔ hao raj kæhœj βaβaw ʔokaj s~θas~θahœroi.
S.FORM: tatini' hao ray kaehoey babaw 'okay sasahoeroi.
S.PHON: tatiniʔ hao raj kæhœj βaβaw ʔokaj s~θas~θahœroi.

TRANSL.notes: 老人在樹上面那邊,(所以)沒有看到.

S.TRANSL: 老人在樹上面那邊, 沒有看到.

TRANSL.notes: (Because) the old man was up in the tree (and) didn't see.

S.TRANSL: the old man was up in the tree didn't see.

S.FORM: 'isaza ka rokrok ni baki' ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaz~ða ka rokrok ni βakiʔ ka βowaj.
S.FORM: 'isaza ka rokrok ni baki' ka boway.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaz~ða ka rokrok ni βakiʔ ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人摘下來的水果,

TRANSL.notes: There (were) the fruits picked by (the old man).

S.TRANSL: There the fruits picked by .

S.FORM: ray rai' 'askan roSa' ila ka kala'.
S.PHON: raj raiʔ ʔas~θkan roʃaʔ ila ka kalaʔ.
S.FORM: ray rai' 'askan roSa' ila ka kala'.
S.PHON: raj raiʔ ʔas~θkan roʃaʔ ila ka kalaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 摘了兩個籃子放在地上.
There were two baskets on the ground.

S.FORM: 'inak'ino' 'isaa korkoring.
S.PHON: ʔinakʔinoʔ ʔis~θaa korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: 'inak'ino' 'isaa korkoring.
S.PHON: ʔinakʔinoʔ ʔis~θaa korkoriŋ.

S.FORM: marma' 'aehae' kala' niya 'araSen papama' ka kapapama'an.
S.PHON: marmaʔ ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ nija ʔaraʃən papamaʔ ka kapapamaʔan.
S.FORM: marma' 'aehae' kala' niya 'araSen papama' ka kapapama'an.
S.PHON: marmaʔ ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ nija ʔaraʃən papamaʔ ka kapapamaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 不知道怎麼了那個小孩偷了一個籃子,騎著腳踏車帶走了.

TRANSL.notes: The child (suddenly/unexpectedly) took one basket and rode on his bike.

S.TRANSL: The child took one basket and rode on his bike.

S.FORM: 'isaa ka tatini' kaSrai' ila ay 'inaray kaehoey babaw.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ka tatiniʔ kaʃraiʔ ila aj ʔinaraj kæhœj βaβaw.
S.FORM: 'isaa ka tatini' kaSrai' ila ay 'inaray kaehoey babaw.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa ka tatiniʔ kaʃraiʔ ila aj ʔinaraj kæhœj βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人從樹上下來.
The old man climbed down from the top of the tree.

S.FORM: kita' ka nisia rokrok ka kala'.
S.PHON: kitaʔ ka nis~θia rokrok ka kalaʔ.
S.FORM: kita' ka nisia rokrok ka kala'.
S.PHON: kitaʔ ka nis~θia rokrok ka kalaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 看著他採的幾籃(水果).

S.TRANSL: 看著他採的幾籃 .

TRANSL.notes: He saw the basket (of fruits that he) picked.

S.TRANSL: He saw the basket picked.

S.FORM: komoSa hayno' ila hini ma'an rokrok ka 'aehae' kala' ka boway hini.
S.PHON: komoʃa hajnoʔ ila hini maʔan rokrok ka ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ ka βowaj hini.
S.FORM: komoSa hayno' ila hini ma'an rokrok ka 'aehae' kala' ka boway hini.
S.PHON: komoʃa hajnoʔ ila hini maʔan rokrok ka ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ ka βowaj hini.
S.TRANSL: 說道:我剛剛採的那一籃水果跑去哪裡了呢?

TRANSL.notes: And he said, where has one basket (of fruit) I picked gone?

S.TRANSL: And he said, where has one basket I picked gone?

S.FORM: o 'isaza korkoring o kilwa'is ila ma' rima' 'ae'aeaew ila rima'.
S.PHON: o ʔis~θaz~ða korkoriŋ o kilwaʔis~θ ila maʔ rimaʔ ʔæʔææw ila rimaʔ.
S.FORM: o 'isaza korkoring o kilwa'is ila ma' rima' 'ae'aeaew ila rima'.
S.PHON: o ʔis~θaz~ða korkoriŋ o kilwaʔis~θ ila maʔ rimaʔ ʔæʔææw ila rimaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子奮力地跑走了.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) rode his bike with all his might and ran away.

S.TRANSL: rode his bike with all his might and ran away.

S.FORM: sia nak'ino.
S.PHON: s~θia nakʔino.
S.FORM: sia nak'ino.
S.PHON: s~θia nakʔino.
S.TRANSL: 他結果怎麼了呢?
What on earth happened?

S.FORM: komoSa yo 'aehae' naehaen ka korkoring mwai' ray raan.
S.PHON: komoʃa jo ʔæhæʔ næhæn ka korkoriŋ mwaiʔ raj raan.
S.FORM: komoSa yo 'aehae' naehaen ka korkoring mwai' ray raan.
S.PHON: komoʃa jo ʔæhæʔ næhæn ka korkoriŋ mwaiʔ raj raan.
S.TRANSL: 在路上又有一個小孩子來了.
Later on the road came another child.

S.FORM: roSa' ila sasbong ila ka kapapama'an ila ka.
S.PHON: roʃaʔ ila s~θas~θβoŋ ila ka kapapamaʔan ila ka.
S.FORM: roSa' ila sasbong ila ka kapapama'an ila ka.
S.PHON: roʃaʔ ila s~θas~θβoŋ ila ka kapapamaʔan ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 兩輛腳踏車相遇.
On the road, two bikes crashed.

S.FORM: ila malben ila ray rai'.
S.PHON: ila malβən ila raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: ila malben ila ray rai'.
S.PHON: ila malβən ila raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 從腳踏車上跌到地上,摔得一踏糊塗.

TRANSL.notes: (Two bikes) fell on the ground.

S.TRANSL: fell on the ground.

S.FORM: hiza ka boway ray kala' sisaeaeh ila ray rai'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka βowaj raj kalaʔ s~θis~θææh ila raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: hiza ka boway ray kala' sisaeaeh ila ray rai'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka βowaj raj kalaʔ s~θis~θææh ila raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那籃子裡的水果都灑出來到地上去了.
The fruits in the basket fell all over the ground.

S.FORM: hiza 'ima haebaeaen ka korkoring kita' koSa anh 'ampowa ila hini korkoring malben ray rai'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔima hæβææn ka korkoriŋ kitaʔ koʃa anh ʔampowa ila hini korkoriŋ malβən raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: hiza 'ima haebaeaen ka korkoring kita' koSa anh 'ampowa ila hini korkoring malben ray rai'.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔima hæβææn ka korkoriŋ kitaʔ koʃa anh ʔampowa ila hini korkoriŋ malβən raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有很多小孩看到就說:這個小朋友怎麼跌到地上了呢?

TRANSL.notes: Those (three) children saw (the fall) and said 'what's with this child who fell on the ground?

S.TRANSL: Those children saw and said 'what's with this child who fell on the ground?

S.FORM: Sa kita'en hini' ka boway ray rai' sisaeaeh ila.
S.PHON: ʃa kitaʔən hiniʔ ka βowaj raj raiʔ s~θis~θææh ila.
S.FORM: Sa kita'en hini' ka boway ray rai' sisaeaeh ila.
S.PHON: ʃa kitaʔən hiniʔ ka βowaj raj raiʔ s~θis~θææh ila.
S.TRANSL: 看到了這些水果倒出來撒在地上.
They went and saw; the fruits have fallen all over the ground.

S.FORM: kita'en ka korkoring noka saboeh rokrok hini ka boway o.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ka korkoriŋ noka s~θaβœh rokrok hini ka βowaj o.
S.FORM: kita'en ka korkoring noka saboeh rokrok hini ka boway o.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ka korkoriŋ noka s~θaβœh rokrok hini ka βowaj o.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩子一起撿水果.

TRANSL.notes: (We) see that all the children then (worked) together to pick up the fruits.

S.TRANSL: see that all the children then together to pick up the fruits.

S.FORM: 'askanen o ray kala'.
S.PHON: ʔas~θkanən o raj kalaʔ.
S.FORM: 'askanen o ray kala'.
S.PHON: ʔas~θkanən o raj kalaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 放在籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: (They) put (the fruits) in the basket.

S.TRANSL: put in the basket.

S.FORM: nak'isaza ka korkoring rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: nakʔis~θaz~ða ka korkoriŋ rokrok ka βowaj.
S.FORM: nak'isaza ka korkoring rokrok ka boway.
S.PHON: nakʔis~θaz~ða ka korkoriŋ rokrok ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 像那樣子小孩子一起撿水果.
This way the children were picking up the fruits.

S.FORM: sia nak'ino 'isaa.
S.PHON: s~θia nakʔino ʔis~θaa.
S.FORM: sia nak'ino 'isaa.
S.PHON: s~θia nakʔino ʔis~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 他怎麼會這樣呢?
What on earth has happened?

S.FORM: ka korkoring kin 'ae'aewhay o.
S.PHON: ka korkoriŋ kin ʔæʔæwhaj o.
S.FORM: ka korkoring kin 'ae'aewhay o.
S.PHON: ka korkoriŋ kin ʔæʔæwhaj o.
S.TRANSL: 那些小孩都那麼壞,
These children were really bad.

S.FORM: ma marma' hiza ka boway ma 'araSen ila si'aelen ila roSa'.
S.PHON: ma marmaʔ hiz~ða ka βowaj ma ʔaraʃən ila s~θiʔælən ila roʃaʔ.
S.FORM: ma marma' hiza ka boway ma 'araSen ila si'aelen ila roSa'.
S.PHON: ma marmaʔ hiz~ða ka βowaj ma ʔaraʃən ila s~θiʔælən ila roʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 也偷走了那些水果,還吃了兩個.
They have not only stolen the fruits, but have also taken and eaten two.

S.FORM: oh 'isaza o komoSa hiza tatini tatini' koSa o.
S.PHON: oh ʔis~θaz~ða o komoʃa hiz~ða tatini tatiniʔ koʃa o.
S.FORM: oh 'isaza o komoSa hiza tatini tatini' koSa o.
S.PHON: oh ʔis~θaz~ða o komoʃa hiz~ða tatini tatiniʔ koʃa o.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個老人說,
Then the old man said,

S.FORM: ma'an hini ka 'aehae' hahila 'ma rokrok ka boway hini o hayno' ila ma' 'aehae' kala'.
S.PHON: maʔan hini ka ʔæhæʔ hahila ʔma rokrok ka βowaj hini o hajnoʔ ila maʔ ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ.
S.FORM: ma'an hini ka 'aehae' hahila 'ma rokrok ka boway hini o hayno' ila ma' 'aehae' kala'.
S.PHON: maʔan hini ka ʔæhæʔ hahila ʔma rokrok ka βowaj hini o hajnoʔ ila maʔ ʔæhæʔ kalaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我花了一天採的水果到哪裡去了呢?
Where has the basket of fruits which I have picked today gone?

S.FORM: kiim kiim kiim 'okay tihoeroei o.
S.PHON: kiim kiim kiim ʔokaj tihœrœi o.
S.FORM: kiim kiim kiim 'okay tihoeroei o.
S.PHON: kiim kiim kiim ʔokaj tihœrœi o.
S.TRANSL: 找呀找呀找呀沒有找到.

TRANSL.notes: He looked for (the fruits), but did not find (them).

S.TRANSL: He looked for , but did not find .

S.FORM: 'isaa komoSa ay nisia raamen komoSa hini ka korkoring mwai'.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa komoʃa aj nis~θia raamən komoʃa hini ka korkoriŋ mwaiʔ.
S.FORM: 'isaa komoSa ay nisia raamen komoSa hini ka korkoring mwai'.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa komoʃa aj nis~θia raamən komoʃa hini ka korkoriŋ mwaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他可能想說這個小孩已有來過.

TRANSL.notes: The child (children) came.

S.TRANSL: The child came.

S.FORM: hini' noka korkoring 'araSen ila ay ka hini ka boway.
S.PHON: hiniʔ noka korkoriŋ ʔaraʃən ila aj ka hini ka βowaj.
S.FORM: hini' noka korkoring 'araSen ila ay ka hini ka boway.
S.PHON: hiniʔ noka korkoriŋ ʔaraʃən ila aj ka hini ka βowaj.
S.TRANSL: 這個水果被小孩子帶走了.
This child took this fruit.

S.FORM: hm koSa ma' 'ana nak'isaa 'al'alak So korkoring si'ael ka hini ka boway ma' 'ampowa 'aewhay.
S.PHON: hm koʃa maʔ ʔana nakʔis~θaa ʔalʔalak ʃo korkoriŋ s~θiʔæl ka hini ka βowaj maʔ ʔampowa ʔæwhaj.
S.FORM: hm koSa ma' 'ana nak'isaa 'al'alak So korkoring si'ael ka hini ka boway ma' 'ampowa 'aewhay.
S.PHON: hm koʃa maʔ ʔana nakʔis~θaa ʔalʔalak ʃo korkoriŋ s~θiʔæl ka hini ka βowaj maʔ ʔampowa ʔæwhaj.
S.TRANSL: 雖然那些水果被小孩子吃掉了,那也不錯.

TRANSL.notes: Although that (the child took the fruit away), there's nothing wrong with the child's eating the fruit.

S.TRANSL: Although that , there's nothing wrong with the child's eating the fruit.

S.FORM: kayzaeh o.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh o.
S.FORM: kayzaeh o.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh o.
S.TRANSL: 也不錯呀!
Good.

S.FORM: 'isaa tatini' ma'az'azem komoSa aio tasi'aelaw ka korkoring o.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa tatiniʔ maʔaz~ðʔaz~ðəm komoʃa aio tas~θiʔælaw ka korkoriŋ o.
S.FORM: 'isaa tatini' ma'az'azem komoSa aio tasi'aelaw ka korkoring o.
S.PHON: ʔis~θaa tatiniʔ maʔaz~ðʔaz~ðəm komoʃa aio tas~θiʔælaw ka korkoriŋ o.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人想說就讓那些小孩子們吃好了.
The old man thought, 'Let the children eat.'

S.FORM: yami tatini' 'ana 'okay si'ael ma' kayzaeh ila o.
S.PHON: jami tatiniʔ ʔana ʔokaj s~θiʔæl maʔ kajz~ðæh ila o.
S.FORM: yami tatini' 'ana 'okay si'ael ma' kayzaeh ila o.
S.PHON: jami tatiniʔ ʔana ʔokaj s~θiʔæl maʔ kajz~ðæh ila o.
S.TRANSL: 我們老人即使沒有吃也還好.

TRANSL.notes: It's all right even if we old people don't eat (the pears).

S.TRANSL: It's all right even if we old people don't eat .

S.FORM: 'isa ma'an ka payakai' papay hini.
S.PHON: ʔis~θa maʔan ka pajakaiʔ papaj hini.
S.FORM: 'isa ma'an ka payakai' papay hini.
S.PHON: ʔis~θa maʔan ka pajakaiʔ papaj hini.
S.TRANSL: 我說的故事就到這邊.
My story ends here.

S.FORM: ma'alo'.
S.PHON: maʔaloʔ.
S.FORM: ma'alo'.
S.PHON: maʔaloʔ.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝.
Thanks.
